steps.title: Subtract equations to eliminate x
steps.content:
Set up the system of equations:
$$x + 2y = 68 \quad \text{...(1)}$$
$$x + y = 50 \quad \text{...(2)}$$
Subtract equation (2) from equation (1) to eliminate $x$:
$$(x + 2y) - (x + y) = 68 - 50$$
$$y = 18$$

steps.title: Substitute to solve for x
steps.content:
Substitute $y = 18$ back into equation (2):
$$x + 18 = 50$$
$$x = 32$$
That matches Choice B — $x = 32$.
